title: Buttery Crispy Filipino Yautia Fritters
description: A cozy, buttery snack of golden crispy fritters made from mashed yautia, flavored with a hint of caramelized sweetness and crisped to perfection in vegan butter.
instructions: Bring a pot of salted water to a boil. Add the yautia pieces and cook for 15 minutes until tender. Drain.
Transfer the cooked yautia to a bowl and mash until smooth, adding plant-based milk gradually until the mixture is thick yet pourable.
In a mixing bowl, whisk together flour, cornmeal, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
Fold the dry mixture into the mashed yautia, stirring until well combined. Add black pepper if desired. The batter should be thick but pliable.
Heat a skillet over medium heat and add melted vegan butter, allowing it to coat the pan evenly.
Drop spoonfuls of batter into the hot pan, flattening slightly with the back of a spoon. Fry for 3-4 minutes on each side until golden brown and crisp.
Remove the fritters with a slotted spoon and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve warm, dusted with a pinch of sea salt or topped with fresh scallions if using.
